name: Chicken Noodle Yogurt Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 quart chicken broth (or 2 bouillon cubes + 2 quart water)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour oil into soup pot; add onion and cook 5 minutes.
2. Add broth bouillon cubes, garlic, thyme, soy sauce, parsley, basil, and carrots to the pot. Cover and bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes.
4. Stir in noodles and cook uncovered for 10 minutes.
5. Add chicken to the soup.
6. In a separate bowl, stir arrowroot into yogurt until well blended.
7. Add the yogurt mixture to the soup, stirring as needed.
8. Increase heat to boiling and allow the soup to thicken slightly.
9. Garnish with chopped green onions before serving.
